title: Mod Manager
author: Author: joker
language.label: Language
detail.empty: Click a Mod on the left to view details
detail.labelOrderAfter: @orderAfter (BUGS may occur if order is wrong)
detail.labelOrderBefore: @orderBefore (BUGS may occur if order is wrong)
param.title: Edit Parameters
param.noDefault: This Mod has parameters without @default. Editing is disabled.
install.title: Install Mod
install.dragHint:
Method 1: Drag .js files or mods folder here
(Dragging a mods folder will batch replace all files with the same name, including non-.js formats)
install.browserNoFolder: Your browser does not support drag & drop folders. Please drag a single .js file.
install.dragJsFile: Please drag a single .js file or the entire mods folder!
install.dragCorrect: Please drag a single .js file, or ensure you are dropping a complete mods folder!
install.copySuccess: Successfully copied {count} item(s) to the mods directory!
install.copyFailed: Failed to process mods folder. Please check the console log!
delete.title: Delete Mod
delete.folderWarning: The entire Mod package folder under _localmods will be deleted.
delete.packageWarning: The whole package will be deleted, including all scripts:
sort.title: Sort Mods
sort.filterBlockedHint: Sorting is only available on the All tab. Switch to All to enable sorting.
footer.restartHint: Changes require game restart (F5) to take effect
changelog.title: Changelog
confirm.title: Confirm Close
confirm.unsavedChanges:
You have unsaved changes. Continue closing?
(Changes will be lost)
confirm.depWarningMsg: Are you sure you want to enable this Mod?
dialog.title: Notice
error.tableNoStruct: Nested struct/note not supported in tables
info.format.会覆盖整个mods文件夹: ⚠️ This will overwrite ALL content in the mods folder (including non-JS files)
confirm.stillEnableMod: Are you sure you want to enable this Mod?
dialog.deleteConfirmMsg:
Are you sure you want to delete Mod [{name}]?
This action cannot be undone!
dialog.deleteWarning: ⚠ After deleting this Mod, any unsaved configuration changes to other Mods will be automatically saved.
dialog.deleteFailed: Failed to delete Mod. Please check console log.
dialog.saveFirst: Please save current changes before installing new mods.
install.orClickBrowse: Method 2: Browse and select .js files (Hold Ctrl/Shift to select multiple)‌
install.dragDirectly: Please drag .js files or mods folder directly into the mods directory!
install.dragJsOrFolder: Drag-and-drop install supports: .js files or a mods folder only!
dep.gameDisabled: Required game plugin: {name} is not enabled
dep.modDisabled: Required Mod plugin: {name} is not enabled
dep.wrongOrder: Should be placed below required Mod: {name}
param.dbNotLoaded: ⚠ Database not loaded, do not enter {label} ID，(Possible reason: The game does not use RMMZ data format)
workshop.disabledHint: Workshop is not enabled for this game
workshop.readOnly: Workshop mods cannot be deleted or overwritten via drag-and-drop install (sorting is allowed)
workshop.missing: Subscribed but missing valid script files
workshop.openSteamHint: Subscribe and unsubscribe via the Steam client Workshop page
workshop.sourceHintManage: Workshop mods cannot be installed or deleted in Mod Manager (sorting is allowed)
workshop.sourceHintSubscribe: Subscribe and unsubscribe in the Steam client Workshop
